I successfully contributed to the evil team's winning streak by playing strategically in key missions, but sometimes my actions were impulsive, leading to unintended consequences. This could be improved by considering the greater good of the mission rather than personal gains. Overall, a decent performance by evil standards.

player_observations.Bob (Good Team Leader): I was surprised by Bob's conservative approach to leadership, often playing it safe and not taking calculated risks. His decisions were predictable, but his loyalty to the good team was unwavering.
player_observations.Charlie (Good Leader and Player): Charlie's leadership and decision-making skills are strong, but he can be too reliant on his trust in team members, which sometimes backfired. Despite this, he's a valuable asset to the good team and a thorn in the side of evil.
player_observations.Diana (Assasssin): Diana's ability to seamlessly blend in with the good team while serving her true loyalties was impressive. Her subtle manipulations often went unnoticed, and her skills were utilized effectively in the game.
player_observations.Eve (Merlin): Eve's strategic prowess was invaluable to both teams, and her ability to analyze situations and make informed decisions was impressive. Her merlin instincts were spot on, and her influence on the game was significant.

reflections.self_assessment: As the Assassin, I was unable to accurately eliminate the actual Merlin, Alice, but I was able to identify and eliminate one of the Good players, Eve. However, my inability to eliminate Alice resulted in my team losing the game. My strategy and tactics were not sufficiently effective in this game.

player_observations.Alice: Alice played a very cautious and subtle game as the Merlin, successfully avoiding my attention and contributing positively to the team's wins. Her ability to blend in and remain unobtrusive was impressive.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie was a good leader and was able to guide his team to two wins, showcasing his strategic thinking and teamwork skills. His calm and composed demeanor likely helped his team stay focused and committed.
player_observations.Diana: Diana played a strong game as the Minion, contributing to two failures of my team. Her ability to work well with the Evil player, Eve, suggests that she is an effective team player and adapts easily to different roles.
player_observations.Eve: Eve was eliminated by me, the Assassin, which might have been a result of her tendency to take on more visible roles, but in hindsight, she seemed to contribute positively to the team's wins and was well-liked by her teammates. Unfortunately, her elimination may have been a strategic choice rather than a necessary one.

reflections.self_assessment: I was unable to effectively utilize my good role to its full potential, particularly in the final mission where I contributed to the team's downfall due to my failure to discern Diana's true role as the assassin. I should have been more vigilant and cautious in my actions. Overall, I feel that my lack of experience with Avalon may have hindered my performance.

player_observations.Alice: I was not surprised to discover that Alice was the evil role, as she seemed to be consistently working against the greater good and using her position to influence our decisions. She was able to effectively manipulate the team's goals and actions.
player_observations.Bob (you): I couldn't assess as I was you.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie's leadership and decision-making skills were invaluable to our team, particularly in the first mission. However, he seemed to be overly trusting of certain players and often followed their advice without questioning its validity.
player_observations.Diana: As the assassin, Diana played a crucial role in our team's failure in several key missions. Her ability to remain stealthy and effectively sabotage our plans was impressive. However, her overconfidence in the final mission led to her being revealed, which ultimately sealed our fate.
player_observations.Eve: With her knowledge of my true role as Merlin, Eve was able to provide me with valuable insights and guidance throughout the game. Her leadership skills were also impressive, particularly in the third mission where she effectively coordinated our team's efforts. Her inexperience as a leader in the final mission, however, allowed her to be easily deceived by Diana's plans.

Unable to reflect on this game.

I performed well during the initial few missions where I played on the teams with Bob and had some success. However, I struggled to provide any real impact when I was leading or making key decisions during critical missions. In hindsight, I underestimated the opposition's capabilities.

player_observations.Alice: As Merlin, Alice played very strategically and kept a low profile, making it difficult for anyone to suspect her intentions. During the Assassin phase, her reveal caught everyone off guard, showcasing her exceptional ability to deceive.
player_observations.Bob: Despite his role as the Assassin, Bob's actions didn't raise any suspicions until the final reveal. He successfully blended in and managed to gain the trust of his teammates, making him a difficult opponent to detect.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie played a solid game, consistently making good decisions that contributed to the team's overall win. His performance was steady and reliable, which is a testament to his skills as a Good player.
player_observations.Diana: As a Good player, I observed that Diana was active in discussions and provided valuable insights during planning phases. Unfortunately, I had to deceive her a few times, but she never seemed to suspect me.
player_observations.Eve: Eve played a great game as a Good player, especially during Mission 3 when she was on the same team as me. She managed to avoid being assassinated and remained an integral part of her team's success.

reflections.self_assessment: As the Assassin, I successfully executed my role by eliminating the Merlin (Eve) in the final mission, allowing the evil team to win. I did a good job of hiding my identity, making it difficult for the good team to figure out who the Assassin was. However, I could improve by being more strategic with my reveals, potentially gaining an advantage earlier in the game.

player_observations.Alice: Alice played a stealthy role as the Minion, successfully completing her missions and helping the evil team win. She was able to work well with the rest of the team, especially the Merlin, and stayed under the radar.
player_observations.Bob: Bob struggled as the Interrogator, frequently failing to discover the identity of the Assassin. He was overly trusting and revealed his suspicions incorrectly, which cost him the game.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie did a great job as the Leader, leading his team and making strong decisions during missions. He was able to successfully complete several missions and was well-respected by his team.
player_observations.Eve: Eve played an excellent Merlin, using her abilities to help the good team succeed and even revealing the Assassin's identity. She was cautious and strategic, which made her a valuable asset to the good team.

reflections.self_assessment: I performed well in this game by contributing to the team and successfully completing missions with good teammates. I also managed to remain undetected as the assassin's target. To improve, I could have been more proactive in questioning players that seemed suspicious and provided a stronger justification for my suspicions in the final round.

player_observations.Alice: Alice was a strong contributor to our team, effectively guiding our strategy and making accurate decisions, which ultimately led to the team's success. Her Merlin role was skillfully hidden as she blended in with the other good players.
player_observations.Bob: Bob's performance as the assassin was impressive, with his ability to remain undetected for the most part. He chose strategic times to 'accidentally' reveal himself, effectively hiding his role from the team.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie was a valuable asset to our team, consistently making sound decisions and helping the team complete its objectives. However, his inexperience showed in the final round when he was unable to prevent the assassin's reveal.
player_observations.Diana: Diana played an interesting game, often acting suspiciously, which made her a target for suspicion. However, she was able to convincingly deceive the team about her role, ultimately being revealed only in the final round.
player_observations.Eve: Note: This is me, so I'll skip self-reflection.
